lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਛੰਤ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee mahalaa 4 chhant ghar 1 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Fourth Mehl, Chhant, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਅਵਗਣ ਵਿਕਣਾ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਾ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh milaae avagan vikanaa gun ravaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: If only I could meet the True Guru, the Primal Being. Discarding my faults and sins, I would chant the Lord's Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਚਵਾ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaae gurabaanee nit nit chavaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: I meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. Continuously, continually, I chant the Word of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਸਦ ਮੀਠੀ ਲਾਗੀ ਪਾਪ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gurabaanee sad meetthee laagee paap vikaar gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Gurbani always seems so sweet; I have eradicated the sins from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai rog geaa bhau bhaagaa sahaje sehaj milaaeaa |
lines.english: The disease of egotism is gone, fear has left, and I am absorbed in celestial peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਸੇਜ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਗਿਆਨ ਤਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਭੋਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa sej gur sabad sukhaalee giaan tat kar bhogo |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the bed of my body has become cozy and beautiful, and I enjoy the essence of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਕਰਿ ਭਾਉ ਕੁੜਮੁ ਕੁੜਮਾਈ ਆਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh kar bhaau kurram kurramaaee aaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: The soul-bride is lovingly embellished with truth and contentment; her Father, the Guru, has come to engage her in marriage to her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੁਖਿ ਮਾਣੇ ਨਿਤ ਰਲੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਧੁਰਿ ਸੰਜੋਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin sukh maane nit raleea naanak dhur sanjogo |1|
lines.english: Night and day, I continually enjoy peace and pleasure. O Nanak, this is my pre-ordained destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰ ਗਾਈ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਪੰਚ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੋਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: baanee gur gaaee param gat paaee panch mile sohaaeaa |
lines.english: Singing the Guru's Bani, I have obtained the supreme status; meeting with the Saints, the self-elect, I am blessed and adorned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਰਿ ਮੇਲੁ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਗਾਵਾਈਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kar mel gurabaanee gaavaaeea bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: Joining with the humble Saints, I sing Gurbani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਇਆ ਕਰੋਧੁ ਮਮਤਾ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਠੀ ਪਾਖੰਡੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: geaa karodh mamataa tan naatthee paakhandd bharam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Anger and attachment have left my body and run away; I have eradicated hypocrisy and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਪੀਰ ਗਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਰੋਗਤ ਭਏ ਸਰੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai peer gee sukh paaeaa aarogat bhe sareeraa |
lines.english: The pain of egotism is gone, and I have found peace; my body has become healthy and free of disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee braham pachhaataa naanak gunee gaheeraa |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, I have realized God, the ocean of virtue. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਛੁੜੀ ਦੂਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਬਲਿ ਗਈ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh vichhurree door mehal na paae bal gee bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is separated, far away from God; she does not obtain the Mansion of His Presence, and she burns.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਮਤਾ ਕੂਰਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਵਿਹਾਝੇ ਕੂੜਿ ਲਈ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar mamataa koor koorr vihaajhe koorr lee bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: Egotism and falsehood are deep within her; deluded by falsehood, she deals only in falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕਪਟੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਗੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kapatt kamaavai mahaa dukh paavai vin satigur mag na paaeaa |
lines.english: Practicing fraud and falsehood, she suffers terrible pain; without the True Guru, she does not find the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਝੜ ਪੰਥਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੈ ਗਾਵਾਰੀ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਧਕੇ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aujharr panth bhramai gaavaaree khin khin dhake khaaeaa |
lines.english: The foolish soul-bride wanders along dismal pathways; each and every moment, she is bumped and pushed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape deaa kare prabh daataa satigur purakh milaae |
lines.english: God, the Great Giver, shows His Mercy, and leads her to meet the True Guru, the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਜਨ ਮੇਲੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke vichhurre jan mele naanak sehaj subhaae |3|
lines.english: Those beings who have been separated for countless incarnations, O Nanak, are reunited with the Lord, with intuitive ease. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਲਗਨੁ ਗਣਾਇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਧਨ ਓਮਾਹੀਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aaeaa lagan ganaae hiradai dhan omaaheea bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: Calculating the most auspicious moment, the Lord comes into the bride's home; her heart is filled with ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤੀ ਵਾਚਾਈ ਮਨਿ ਵਜੀ ਵਧਾਈ ਜਬ ਸਾਜਨ ਸੁਣੇ ਘਰਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: patee vaachaaee man vajee vadhaaee jab saajan sune ghar aae |
lines.english: They have consulted the almanacs, and the bride's mind vibrates with bliss, when she hears that her Friend is coming into the home of her heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪਾਧੇ ਆਣਿ ਪਤੀ ਬਹਿ ਵਾਚਾਈਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: panddit paadhe aan patee beh vaachaaeea bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: The Pandits and astrologers have come, to sit and consult the almanacs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣੀ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਬਹਿ ਮਤਾ ਪਕਾਇਆ ਫੇਰੇ ਤਤੁ ਦਿਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gunee giaanee beh mataa pakaaeaa fere tat divaae |
lines.english: The virtuous and wise men sat down and decided to perform the marriage immediately.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਦ ਨਵਤਨੁ ਬਾਲ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: var paaeaa purakh agam agochar sad navatan baal sakhaaee |
lines.english: She has found her Husband, the Inaccessible, Unfathomable Primal Lord, who is forever young; He is her Best Friend from her earliest childhood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਮੇਲੇ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kirapaa kar kai mele vichhurr kade na jaaee |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he has mercifully united the bride with Himself. She shall never be separated again. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪਹਿਲੜੀ ਲਾਵ ਪਰਵਿਰਤੀ ਕਰਮ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har pahilarree laav paraviratee karam drirraaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: In the first round of the marriage ceremony, the Lord sets out His Instructions for performing the daily duties of married life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dharam drirrahu har naam dhiaavahu simrit naam drirraaeaa |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord's Name; embrace and enshrine the contemplative remembrance of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਵੇਦੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਹੁ ਪਾਪ ਤਜਾਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: baanee brahamaa ved dharam drirrahu paap tajaaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: Instead of the hymns of the Vedas to Brahma, embrace the righteous conduct of Dharma, and renounce sinful actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਆਰਾਧਹੁ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur gur pooraa aaraadhahu sabh kilavikh paap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Worship and adore the Guru, the Perfect True Guru, and all your sins shall be dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੋਆ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj anand hoaa vaddabhaagee man har har meetthaa laaeaa |
lines.english: By great good fortune, celestial bliss is attained, and the Lord, Har, Har, seems sweet to the mind.
